title: Program
description: A DYCD program offering — the thing a young person or family actually enrolls in (e.g. Summer Youth Employment Program (SYEP), COMPASS/SONYC after-school, Beacon, Cornerstone, adult literacy, immigrant services). NYC Open Data has no clean catalog of program offerings; the authoritative surface is the DiscoverDYCD program finder (discoverdycd.dycdconnect.nyc), whose taxonomy (Program Area / Program Type / Service Category) is echoed on the 'DYCD Program Sites' dataset. This schema reconstructs the program as a resource.

programName.description: Program offering name (e.g. 'Summer Youth Employment Program').

programType.description: Program type ('Program Type', e.g. SYEP, COMPASS Elementary, SONYC, Beacon).

eligibility.description: Eligibility summary (residency, income, age, school status).

seasonal.description: Whether the program runs on a seasonal cycle (e.g. SYEP is summer-only).

applicationOpen.description: Whether applications are currently being accepted.

siteCount.description: Number of active program sites delivering this program.
